001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity;
002
003import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
004import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
005import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
006import androidx.room.Entity;
007import androidx.room.Index;
008import androidx.room.PrimaryKey;
009
010@Entity(
011    tableName = "incubator",
012    indices = {
013        @Index(value = "name")
014    }
015)
016
017/**
018 * Room entity representing an egg incubator device.
019 */
020public class Incubator {
021
022  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate = true)
023  @ColumnInfo(name = "incubator_id")
024  private long id;
025
026  @SuppressWarnings("NotNullFieldNotInitialized")
027  @NonNull
028  private String name;
029
030  @SuppressWarnings("NotNullFieldNotInitialized")
031  @NonNull
032  private String model;
033
034  @ColumnInfo(name = "target_temperature")
035  private double targetTemperature;
036
037  @ColumnInfo(name = "target_humidity")
038  private double targetHumidity;
039
040  @Nullable
041  private String notes;
042
043  @ColumnInfo(name = "active", defaultValue = "1")
044  private boolean active;
045
046  /**
047   * Gets the unique identifier for this incubator.
048   *
049   * @return the incubator ID
050   */
051  public long getId() {
052    return id;
053  }
054
055  /**
056   * Sets the unique identifier for this incubator.
057   *
058   * @param id the incubator ID to set
059   */
060  public void setId(long id) {
061    this.id = id;
062  }
063
064  /**
065   * Gets the name of this incubator.
066   *
067   * @return the incubator name
068   */
069  @NonNull
070  public String getName() {
071    return name;
072  }
073
074  /**
075   * Sets the name of this incubator.
076   *
077   * @param name the incubator name to set
078   */
079  public void setName(@NonNull String name) {
080    this.name = name;
081  }
082
083  /**
084   * Gets the model of this incubator.
085   *
086   * @return the incubator model
087   */
088  @NonNull
089  public String getModel() {
090    return model;
091  }
092
093  /**
094   * Sets the model of this incubator.
095   *
096   * @param model the incubator model to set
097   */
098  public void setModel(@NonNull String model) {
099    this.model = model;
100  }
101
102  /**
103   * Gets the target temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for this incubator.
104   *
105   * @return the target temperature
106   */
107  public double getTargetTemperature() {
108    return targetTemperature;
109  }
110
111  /**
112   * Sets the target temperature in degrees Fahrenheit for this incubator.
113   *
114   * @param targetTemperature the target temperature to set
115   */
116  public void setTargetTemperature(double targetTemperature) {
117    this.targetTemperature = targetTemperature;
118  }
119
120  /**
121   * Gets the target humidity percentage for this incubator.
122   *
123   * @return the target humidity
124   */
125  public double getTargetHumidity() {
126    return targetHumidity;
127  }
128
129  /**
130   * Sets the target humidity percentage for this incubator.
131   *
132   * @param targetHumidity the target humidity to set
133   */
134  public void setTargetHumidity(double targetHumidity) {
135    this.targetHumidity = targetHumidity;
136  }
137
138  /**
139   * Gets any notes associated with this incubator.
140   *
141   * @return the notes, or null if none recorded
142   */
143  @Nullable
144  public String getNotes() {
145    return notes;
146  }
147
148  /**
149   * Sets notes associated with this incubator.
150   *
151   * @param notes the notes to set
152   */
153  public void setNotes(@Nullable String notes) {
154    this.notes = notes;
155  }
156
157  /**
158   * Checks whether this incubator is active.
159   *
160   * @return true if active, false otherwise
161   */
162  public boolean isActive() {
163    return active;
164  }
165
166  /**
167   * Sets whether this incubator is active.
168   *
169   * @param active true to mark as active, false otherwise
170   */
171  public void setActive(boolean active) {
172    this.active = active;
173  }
174}
